raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 375 aims to enhance emergency response efforts and improve wildfire preparedness in California.",
    "SB 375 will remove regulatory hurdles in the California Endangered Species Act, California Environmental Quality Act, and The California Coastal Act.",
    "SB 375 establishes a framework for local agencies to submit wildfire preparedness plans that prioritize vegetation management and fire mitigation activities.",
    "The efforts outlined in SB 375 are designed to reduce the risk of catastrophic wildfires while protecting endangered and threatened species through science-backed conservation measures.",
    "The California Department of Fish and Wildlife is required to work closely with local agencies to provide guidance on incidental take permits and environmental compliance.",
    "SB 375 mandates annual updates on wildfire preparedness plans and their effectiveness in preventing future disasters."
  ]
}
```
